title: COVID-19: A pandemic
author: Khan Muhammad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Coronavirus belong to the genus Coronavirus in the Coronaviridae, and they are enveloped, positive single-stranded large RNA viruses that infect humans, but also a wide range of animals. It has a tendency of high degree of mutation and clinical manifestation vary a lot. The objective of literature review was to summarize (COVID-19) epidemiology, transmission and basic preventive measures that can be adopted by a society to stop its spread.
steps_raw: Coronavirus belong to the genus Coronavirus in the Coronaviridae, and they are enveloped, positive single-stranded large RNA viruses that infect humans, but also a wide range of animals. It has a tendency of high degree of mutation and clinical manifestation vary a lot.
